_publications._publicationTitle: Fibroblasts Attenuate Anti-Tumor Drug Efficacy in Tumor Cells via Paracrine Interactions with Tumor Cells in 3D Plexiform Neurofibroma Cultures.

_contextSnippet: which was verified by 3D quantitative analysis using Volocity [Figure 1 E (ipNF95.11bC) and Figure 1 F (ipNF05.5)]
details: Successfully verified drug treatment effects through 3D quantitative analysis of live tumor structures
